commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 9:26 For these Levites, the four chief gatekeepers, were in their office of trust, and were over the chambers and treasuries of the house of God. Hebrew, "for these Levites, (Sellum; ver. 17) four chief porters were in their set office "for life, or as long as they were able to serve, and did not change every week like the rest. Lord: the apartments of the priests, and the storehouses, (Haydock) where all precious ornaments, wine, were kept.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
